TÜBİTAK ARDEB 1001 Program Supports 6 New Projects at KHAS

It is our distinct pleasure to announce that in the 1st term of 2025 TÜBİTAK ARDEB 1001 program,

6 of the 11 research projects

that submitted from our university have been

funded.

The support rate for projects presented by our university in the first semester of 2025 is

%54,54

.

We congratulate our faculty members for their achievement and also we would like to thank our panelists for their valuable contributions during the panels.

The funded project informations are in the table below.

Project Coordinator

Faculty/Department

Project Title

Researcher/Advisor

Data-Driven Mathematical Modeling of Brain Network Dynamics and Prediction of Critical Transitions

Assoc. Prof. Emrullah Fatih Yetkin

Faculty of Economics, Administrative and Social Sciences/Management Information Systems

Development of a Novel Data Privacy Approach for Machine Learning in Cloud Systems

Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences /Molecular Biology and Genetics

Discovery of Unique Peptidomimetic Compounds with Computational and Experimental Methods for Understanding and Preventing Tau Protein Aggregation Mechanism in Alzheimer's Disease

Assist. Prof. Yasemin Önder (Researcher)

Assist. Prof. Yasemin Önder

Prof. Dr. Demet Akten
